data.title: Omnicell reports Q2 2025 financial performance.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous quarter. Additionally, the economy saw an increase of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. This positive trend indicates a promising outlook for the job market and overall economic growth. Moreover, the stock market experienced a notable surge, with the major indices all showing gains of over 2%. Investors are optimistic about the future prospects of the market following this strong performance.

data.title: FRV selects Envision Energy as strategic partner for green ammonia project in Brazil. Focusing on H2 Cumbuco, it ensures success.
data.description: In Madrid on July 31, 2025, Fotowatio Renewable Ventures (FRV) under Jameel Energy revealed their partnership with Envision Energy for a green ammonia project in Brazil. Envision was chosen for their demonstrated leadership and expertise in this field.

data.title: TC Energy declares $0.85 quarterly dividend per common share, payable on Oct. 31, 2025, to shareholders of record by Sept. 29.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta as of July 31, 2025, TC Energy Corporation (TSX, NYSE: TRP) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.85 per common share for the quarter ending Sept. 30, 2025. This dividend applies to the outstanding common shares of the company and will be payable on Oct. 31, 2025. Shareholders recorded as of the closing of business on Sept. 29, 2025, will receive the dividend.

data.title: Royal Court orders meetings for MAC shareholders to consider acquisition by Harmony Gold. ARBN 671 963 198. Subsidiary of JSE:HAR, NYSE:H.
data.description: In St. Helier, Jersey, MAC Copper Limited (NYSE: MTAL; ASX: MAC) recently received a positive development as the Royal Court of Jersey has mandated shareholder meetings to deliberate on the potential acquisition of MAC by Harmony Gold (Australia) Pty Ltd, a subsidiary of Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited (JSE: HAR, NYSE: H). The acquisition would involve acquiring 100% of MAC's issued share capital. The court's decision opens the door for shareholders to weigh in on this significant deal, which could have substantial implications for both companies involved.

data.title: Copper prices fell 20% after Trump's tariff decision; only semi-finished copper products included in 50% import tax.
data.description: Copper prices experienced a drastic drop of almost 20% following President Donald Trump's unexpected decision to omit refined copper from a significant 50% import tariff. This move abruptly halted a months-long rally driven by concerns over extensive trade restrictions. The White House announced that starting August 1, the new tariffs will only impact semi-finished copper products like pipes, wires, rods, sheets, and tubes, as well as copper-intensive items such as pipe fittings, cables, and electrical components. Notably, the exclusion list includes essential input materials like ores, concentrates, mattes, cathodes, and anodes, safeguarding them from tariffs. The proclamation also unveiled provisions under the Defense Production Act aimed at enhancing domestic refining and smelting capabilities. Consequently, COMEX copper futures plummeted to a low of $4.50 per pound, marking the most significant single-day decline in recent times. This development was part of a larger story detailed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CMS Energy reports $0.66 EPS for Q2 2025 (up from $0.65 in 2024), reaffirms 2025 guidance.
data.description: In Jackson, Michigan on July 31, 2025, CMS Energy disclosed their financial results for the second quarter of the year. Earnings per share for this quarter were reported at $0.66, indicating a slight increase from the $0.65 per share earned during the same period in 2024. After adjustments, the company's earnings per share for the second quarter stood at $0.71, showing an improvement from the $0.66 per share recorded in the prior year.

data.title: Thesis Gold appoints Russell Ball to Board of Directors and David Garratt as CFO and Corporate Secretary.
data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia - July 31, 2025 - Thesis Gold Inc. (TSXV: TAU) (WKN: A3EP87) (OTCQX: THSGF) has appointed Russell Ball to its Board of Directors and David Garratt as the new Chief Financial Officer and Corporate Secretary. The Company is delighted to welcome these key executives to their team.

data.title: Canaan Inc. to supply more Avalon A1566I Immersion-Cooling Miners to CleanSpark, with purchase order from U.S. subsidiary.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Canaan Inc. (NASDAQ: CAN), a leading player in crypto mining, revealed that its U.S. subsidiary had secured a purchase order from CleanSpark Inc. (NASDAQ: CLSK) for more Avalon A1566I units. This partnership underscores the growing demand in the crypto space.

data.title: PBF Energy reports Q2 income of $43.0 million, $110.0 million loss from operations. Declares dividend of $0.275/share.
data.description: In the second quarter, PBF Energy reported an income of $43.0 million from operations, excluding special items. However, there was a loss of $110.0 million from operations during the same period. The Martinez refinery saw a partial restoration of operations. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.275 per share. This information was disclosed by PBF Energy, headquartered in Parsippany, New Jersey, on July 31, 2025.

data.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings reveals Q2 2025 financial results.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the economy grew by 3.5% during the last fiscal quarter, surpassing analysts' expectations. Unemployment has dropped to a record low of 3.9%, which is the lowest in the past decade. Additionally, the stock market saw a considerable surge, with the main index rising by 7% in just one week. Experts believe that these positive indicators are a result of the government's new economic policies and increased consumer spending. With inflation remaining stable at 2.3%, the overall financial outlook appears robust for the foreseeable future.

data.title: AI survey: 1 in 20 US workers hold multiple full-time jobs; 1 in 8 Gen Zers use AI for work.
data.description: According to a recent survey by AIResumeBuilder.com, approximately 5% of full-time workers in the United States are juggling multiple full-time jobs. These individuals have emphasized the importance of artificial intelligence tools in assisting them with managing their workloads effectively. The survey highlights the significant impact AI technology has on supporting overemployed workers in balancing their responsibilities.

data.title: BorgWarner raises quarterly dividend by 55% to $0.17 per share, compares to previous rate.
data.description: A company based in Auburn Hills, Michigan announced on July 30, 2025 that its Board of Directors authorized a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share for common stock, which marks a significant 55% rise from the previous dividend amount. The company is identified by the ticker symbol BWA on the New York Stock Exchange.
